description: Tracks all department requisitions from initial submission through AI validation to PO generation (Blueprint 5A). Workflow 03 creates records here, Workflow 04 updates with AI decision.

fields.name: Requisition ID
fields.description: Unique requisition identifier. Generated by workflow 03 in format REQ-{timestamp}-{random}.

fields.name: Department
fields.description: Department submitting the requisition.

fields.name: Item Name
fields.description: Name of the item being requested. Maps to 'itemName' in workflow 03.

fields.name: SKU
fields.description: Stock Keeping Unit code if available. Links to Inventory table.

fields.name: Quantity Requested
fields.description: Quantity requested by the department. Maps to 'quantityRequested' in workflow 03.

fields.name: UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure (each, case, gallon, lb, etc.).

fields.name: Urgency
fields.description: Priority level of the request. Used by AI to prioritize validation.

fields.name: Date Needed
fields.description: Date the item is needed by.

fields.name: Justification
fields.description: Reason for the request. Helps AI validate unusual quantities.

fields.name: Requester
fields.description: Name of the person submitting the request.

fields.name: Requester Email
fields.description: Email for notifications back to requester.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Current state in the requisition workflow.

fields.name: Submitted At
fields.description: Timestamp when requisition was submitted. Maps to workflow 03.

fields.name: AI Decision
fields.description: Claude AI validation result (APPROVE/REDUCE/REJECT/FLAG). Set by workflow 04.

fields.name: Approved Quantity
fields.description: Final approved quantity (may be reduced from original). Set by workflow 04.

fields.name: AI Reason
fields.description: Explanation for AI decision. Set by workflow 04.
fields.example: Stock below par, quantity matches typical pattern

fields.name: AI Confidence
fields.description: Confidence score of AI decision (0-100%).

fields.name: AI Flag Reason
fields.description: Specific reason if flagged (high-value, new requester, etc.).

fields.name: Validated At
fields.description: When AI validation completed. Set by workflow 04.

fields.name: Purchase Order
fields.description: Link to generated PO if converted.

fields.name: Current Stock
fields.description: Stock level at time of validation (from Inventory table).

fields.name: Par Level
fields.description: Par level for this item (from Inventory table).

fields.name: Pending Orders
fields.description: Quantity on order not yet received.

fields.name: Avg Daily Usage
fields.description: 7-day average daily consumption.

fields.name: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes.

fields.name: Created At
fields.description: Record creation timestamp.

fields.name: Last Modified
fields.description: Last update timestamp.

views.name: Approved - Ready for PO
views.description: Approved requisitions not yet converted to POs.
